a.class: navigation-link mdc-button mat-mdc-button mat-unthemed mat-mdc-button-base ng-star-inserted

qhana-help-tooltip.label: Show help for the experiment info tab.
qhana-help-tooltip.ng-reflect-label: Show help for the experiment i

button.aria-label: Show help for the experiment info tab.

div.p: The experiment info tab shows the basic experiment information like name and description. It can also be used to change this information. The functions for exporting experiment data or cloning the experiment can also be found in this tab.

a.class: navigation-link mdc-button mat-mdc-button mat-unthemed mat-mdc-button-base ng-star-inserted

qhana-help-tooltip.label: Show help for the experiment data tab.
qhana-help-tooltip.ng-reflect-label: Show help for the experiment d

button.aria-label: Show help for the experiment data tab.

div.p: The experiment workspace allows for experiments using the available plugins to create, filter, analyze and otherwise manipulate data. The available plugins are shown in the workspace sidebar to the left. The plugin list is grouped by categories and can be searched.

a.class: navigation-link mdc-button mat-mdc-button mat-unthemed mat-mdc-button-base ng-star-inserted

qhana-help-tooltip.label: Show help for the experiment data tab.
qhana-help-tooltip.ng-reflect-label: Show help for the experiment d

button.aria-label: Show help for the experiment data tab.

div.p: Any data produced during the experiment can be found here. If new data is produced with the same name, it is considered as a new version of the same data.

a.class: navigation-link mdc-button mat-mdc-button mat-unthemed mat-mdc-button-base ng-star-inserted

qhana-help-tooltip.label: Show help for the experiment timeline tab.
qhana-help-tooltip.ng-reflect-label: Show help for the experiment t

button.aria-label: Show help for the experiment timeline tab.

div.p: Every computation step of the experiment gets recorded in the experiment timeline. Each step records its inputs and outputs, any sub-steps an execution log and more. Steps can also be graded by the user to indicate how useful their result was. Additionally notes can be be stored for each step.

a.class: mdc-button mat-mdc-button navigation-link mat-unthemed mat-mdc-button-base ng-star-inserted active

qhana-help-tooltip.label: Show help for the experiment switcher.
qhana-help-tooltip.ng-reflect-label: Show help for the experiment s

button.aria-label: Show help for the experiment switcher.

div.p: The experiment switcher shows the name of the current experiment and allows for switching to a different experiment.

button.class: mat-mdc-menu-trigger downloads-button mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-unthemed mat-mdc-button-base

mat-icon.class: mat-icon notranslate mat-badge mat-badge-accent material-icons mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color mat-badge-overlap mat-badge-above mat-badge-after mat-badge-small mat-badge-hidden

qhana-help-tooltip.label: Show help for the experiment download menu.
qhana-help-tooltip.ng-reflect-label: Show help for the experiment d

button.aria-label: Show help for the experiment download menu.

div.p: Exported experiments will show up here once they are ready to be downloaded.

mat-icon.class: mat-icon notranslate mat-text material-icons mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color

qhana-help-tooltip.label: Show help for the settings page.
qhana-help-tooltip.ng-reflect-label: Show help for the settings pag

button.aria-label: Show help for the settings page.

div.p: The settings page can be used to change various settings. It contains the settings for connecting to the plugin registry. It also allows editing services and environment variables stored in the plugin registry.

mat-icon.class: mat-icon notranslate material-icons mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted
mat-icon notranslate material-icons mat-ligature-font mat-icon-inline mat-icon-no-color
mat-icon notranslate material-icons mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted
